div.p: Legend: 🟢 Live vector (5 total) 🔴 Tombstone (3 total) Wasted space: 3 slots × 3KB = 9KB
Legend: 🟢 Unmoved vector 🔵 Relocated vector Reclaimed: 3 slots × 3KB = 9KB New capacity: 5 slots

Time Complexity: O(N) single pass Space Overhead: O(N) for old_to_new map When to Compact: • Tombstone ratio > 30% • After bulk deletes • During maintenance windows Trade-off: • Compaction blocks writes • Run during low traffic • Consider incremental compaction
